description: A paginated list of deal records.
name: CollectionResponseDeal

id.description: The unique identifier for the deal.

properties.description: The deal's properties as key-value pairs.

createdAt.description: The date and time the deal was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the deal was last updated.

archived.description: Whether the deal has been archived.

associations.description: The deal's associations with other CRM objects.
